name: Carolina Heating & Air Inc.
description: Professional HVAC installation, repair, and maintenance serving Spartanburg and surrounding areas. Family owned business with over 20 years of experience.

reviews.text: Outstanding service! They installed our new heat pump system quickly and professionally. Very knowledgeable about energy-efficient options.
Great work on our AC repair during the summer heat wave. Technician was punctual and explained everything clearly.

name: Spartan Plumbing Solutions
description: Licensed plumbers providing residential and commercial plumbing services in the Spartanburg area. 24/7 emergency service available.

reviews.text: Excellent emergency service! They came out late at night to fix a major pipe leak. Professional, fast, and reasonably priced.
Did a great job on our bathroom renovation plumbing. Clean work and finished on schedule.

name: Palmetto Electricians
description: Licensed electrical contractors specializing in residential electrical work, panel upgrades, and smart home installations throughout the Upstate.

reviews.text: Fantastic electrical work! Upgraded our entire electrical panel and added smart outlets throughout the house. Very professional crew.
Great experience with outdoor lighting installation. They provided excellent design suggestions and quality workmanship.
Fredrick did a great job at building out our flower bed and landscaping with the rock walls. His prices are great, and he responds quickly when contacted.
